# Digital Commerce 360 Retail

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Surging digital order volumes, no-contact shopping, and curbside pickup are widespread during pandemic-era retail. Businesses have been forced to pivot supply chain strategies, tweak revenue streams, and quickly learn to serve a shape-shifting customer base without losing too much steam. For fraudsters, though, it’s enabling new ways of stealing data and dollars, allowing them to take advantage of businesses that are already struggling to stay afloat.

Explore this new report from Sift and Digital Commerce 360 to learn:

*   12+ strategies for fighting fraud during the pandemic
*   The true impact of digital gift card and BOPIS/BORIS fraud
*   Everything you need to know about the malicious hackers of Magecart, and how they attack third-party software to commit digital shopping cart fraud
*   Key retail fraud insights from LexisNexis and NuData

### Download the Ebook

Get the Ebook

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
